prototypes.label: Enhanced CSS Overlay
prototypes.buildLog: bunx tsc --noEmit clean. 0 errors, 0 warnings. CSS animations, CognitiveLoadManager, modality flags, worldToScreen projection all type-checked.
claimsValidated: SpeechBubbleContent extensible with optional animationHints + modalityFlags (additive, no breaking change)
CognitiveLoadManager derives content density from MiniHudTelemetry (3 tiers: full/reduced/minimal)
CSS-native animation class resolution (keyframes, not JS runtime) — zero main-thread overhead
prefers-reduced-motion gating: animation class always empty when reduced-motion preferred (WCAG 2.3)
worldToScreen projection path unchanged from PR#28 — postprocessing stacking context preserved
Modality flags → DOM data-attributes for CSS ::before phase icons and vocabulary highlights
Beat sequencing invariants: promptText/promptKey/beatIndex/totalBeats never stripped by adaptation
gapsConfirmed: NE-02: CSS overlay z-order vs postprocessing canvas — requires browser DevTools validation
NE-03: ARIA live region audit — requires axe-core or screen reader test

prototypes.label: Hybrid Diegetic + Overlay
prototypes.buildLog: bunx tsc --noEmit clean. 0 errors. troika-three-text and Three.js types resolved via ambient declarations in deps.d.ts.
claimsValidated: ContentDeliveryResolver routes all 5 TeachingBeat phases with TypeScript exhaustive never-check
SpatialAnnotation DATA entity extends ontology without SpeechBubbleContent contract breakage
troika-three-text Text mesh config shape validated via ambient .d.ts — API structurally compatible
renderBeforeCompositor=true contract point documented for EffectComposer pass ordering
Graceful CSS fallback when troika font atlas not compiled (troikaReady=false → fallback-css)
Diegetic labels return correct mesh count matching annotation array length
Phase routing: motivate/explain/demonstrate → diegetic; practice/assess → css-overlay
gapsConfirmed: C-B01-1: troika shader pass ordering vs EffectComposer — requires live Three.js renderer
C-B03-1: SDF per-draw-call GPU overhead on low-end hardware — requires device profiling

cases.name: CSS animation class resolution: fade-in → sb-anim-fade-in
Beat sequencing invariant: promptText never stripped
All 3 beats × 3 telemetry scenarios pass invariants
SpatialAnnotation filters correctly by phase visibility
troika label config: fontSize by labelType (vocabulary=0.15)
Diegetic render: mesh count matches annotation count

failureModes.description: NE-02: CSS overlay z-order vs Three.js postprocessing canvas cannot be verified without a live browser. worldToScreen projection path is proven unchanged, but actual GPU-level stacking context requires DevTools validation. No test failure — gap carried from prototype.
failureModes.affectedClaim: worldToScreen projection path unchanged — postprocessing stacking context preserved
failureModes.recommendation: Validate in browser DevTools: confirm CSS overlay z-index renders above postprocessing canvas without the container element introducing a new stacking context via transform or opacity.

failureModes.description: NE-03: ARIA live region audit (axe-core/screen reader) not covered by TS-layer tests. data-phase attributes are verified but aria-live and role=status markup live in JSX/HTML templates outside prototype scope.
failureModes.affectedClaim: Modality flags → DOM data-attributes for CSS ::before phase icons and vocabulary highlights
failureModes.recommendation: Add aria-live='polite' to SpeechBubble wrapper in the React component layer. Add axe-core to CI test suite for regression coverage.

failureModes.description: C-B01-1: troika-three-text shader pass ordering vs EffectComposer cannot be verified without a live Three.js renderer. renderBeforeCompositor=true is the documented contract point but its effect depends on EffectComposer version and pass registration order at runtime.
failureModes.affectedClaim: renderBeforeCompositor=true contract point documented for EffectComposer pass ordering
failureModes.recommendation: Integration test in a headless Three.js environment (node-three-gl or Playwright + WebGL). Verify troika Text meshes render before bloom/outline passes and are not clipped by compositor render target.

failureModes.description: C-B03-1: SDF per-draw-call GPU overhead on low-end Chromebook hardware cannot be measured without device profiling. troika-three-text generates one draw call per Text mesh. For 5+ simultaneous diegetic annotations this may exceed frame budget on integrated GPU devices.
failureModes.affectedClaim: troika-three-text Text mesh config shape validated — API structurally compatible
failureModes.recommendation: Profile on target device (Chromebook Intel UHD 620 or equivalent). Consider batching annotations into an instanced mesh or SDF atlasing if draw call count exceeds 4 per frame in diegetic mode.

evaluatorGate.summary: 14 PASS, 0 FAIL, 1 N/A. All rejection criteria satisfied. Independent verification: bun test 74/74 (H-A) + 30/30 (H-B), bunx tsc --noEmit clean.

ruleDetails.R1: PASS — No critical claims on tier-4/5 only. H-A backed by tier-1 (DevCon5, troika official, Three.js official, PR#28 codebase) + tier-3 (Mayer CTML). Lowest-confidence claim (clm-ext-19 troika FPS, 0.60) flagged as gap NE-B-01, not in primary recommendation chain.
ruleDetails.R2: N/A — 8 contradictions: 3 resolved, 4 evidence-gaps with experiments assigned, 1 well-evidenced in deprioritized H-C. S-C-adversarial correctly flagged insufficient. No irreconcilable contradictions block recommendation.
ruleDetails.R3: PASS — rec-cd-001 links scenarioIds [S-A-01..04, S-B-01..04]. 12 total scenarios (4 types x 3 hypotheses), 2 revision rounds, STOPPING_CRITERIA_MET=true.
ruleDetails.R4: PASS — riskIds [NE-02, NE-03, C-B01-1, C-B03-1]. 4 next-experiments in scenarios.json. 3 experiments in decision-log. Research gaps g-01/g-02/g-03 tracked.
ruleDetails.R5: PASS — 14 sources: 3 current, 8 aging, 1 stale (three-mesh-ui — excluded from recommendation). Critical H-A claims backed by current/aging sources.
ruleDetails.R6: PASS — All 40+ claims tagged [Official]/[Synthesis]/[Inference] with confidence 0.60-0.99. No blurred provenance.
ruleDetails.R7: PASS — rec-cd-001 has 7-point non-generic winRationale with evidence links.
ruleDetails.R8: PASS — H-B as explicit alternative with alternativeRationale. H-C fully analyzed (4 scenarios) showing deprioritization.
ruleDetails.R9: PASS — H-A base scenario sufficient. 6/7 questions answered, 1 partial with explicit gap. Partial ratings honest with experiments assigned.
ruleDetails.R11: PASS — 21 objects: DATA(7), LOGIC(6), ACTION(5), LEARN(3). All with semanticHeuristic. All hypotheses have dlaJustification.
ruleDetails.R12: PASS — devcon5Analysis populated: ddd(4), dry(4), ocp(3+), pecs(present). All 21 objects have DDD/DRY/OCP/PECS. All 12 scenarios scored.
ruleDetails.R13: PASS — ForwardProp: 5 paths, partial health, gaps documented. BackwardProp: 4 paths, partial. CSS3DObject broken (correctly excluded). No recommended-path propagation broken.
ruleDetails.R14: PASS — proto-cd-A-001 + proto-cd-B-001 both buildStatus=pass, tsc clean. Independently verified.
ruleDetails.R15: PASS — H-A: 9/9 (verified 74/74). H-B: 8/8 (verified 30/30). Zero failure modes blocking. 4 documented gaps with recommendations.

evaluatorGate.debateReason: Pass rate delta=0%. No D/L/A misclassification. No new failure types. H-C deprioritization evidence-based.
evaluatorCaveats: 5 'detected' contradictions remain as evidence-gaps — should be tracked post-acceptance (c-A-best-1, c-B-b-1, c-B-worst-1, c-C-b-1, c-C-worst-1)
7/12 scenarios have evidenceSufficiency='partial' — significant validation work remains during implementation
All propagation paths are 'partial' — architecture designed but not implemented; health is theoretical until code exists
H-B evolution path depends on NE-B-01 (troika FPS on Chromebook) — p0 experiment before any H-B work
